articles.title: ‘I am scared for my safety’: Plymouth police officer placed on leave is accused of sexual abuse, records show
articles.description:
The officer and her husband have been accused of repeatedly sexually assaulting someone over whom they had legal guardianship.

The post ‘I am scared for my safety’: Plymouth police officer placed on leave is accused of sexual abuse, records show appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Plymouth police officer placed on leave amid sexual abuse allegations involving a ward.
Officer and her husband accused of repeated assaults over a legal guardian relationship.
Concerns raised about community safety and trust in local law enforcement.

articles.title: Testimony of officer who shot Kelsey Fitzsimmons continues on day 2 of trial
articles.description:
Fitzsimmons was shot by a colleague last year. She is charged with assault and battery with a dangerous weapon. A bench trial is ongoing.

The post Testimony of officer who shot Kelsey Fitzsimmons continues on day 2 of trial appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Officer Kelsey Fitzsimmons was shot by a colleague during an incident last year.
Fitzsimmons faces charges of assault and battery with a dangerous weapon.
The ongoing bench trial may influence public perception of police accountability in Boston.

articles.title: Senate Democrats urge Kennedy to stop hindering key health panel
articles.description:
The health secretary has canceled or postponed three meetings of the US Preventive Services Task Force, which shapes health care coverage for Americans.

The post Senate Democrats urge Kennedy to stop hindering key health panel appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Senate Democrats are urging Senator Kennedy to support the US Preventive Services Task Force.
Health Secretary canceled three meetings, affecting health care coverage decisions for Americans.
Delays in the task force's work could impact preventive health services for Boston residents.
